mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (title, stock, start_time, end_time, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, stock, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM coupon ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT id, title, stock, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM coupon WHERE status = ? ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon WHERE status = ?
SELECT id, title, stock, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM coupon WHERE id = ?
SELECT id, title, stock, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM coupon WHERE id = ? FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE coupon SET stock = stock - 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = ? AND stock > 0
UPDATE coupon SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = ?
